calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-15-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff: International Collection Corp.
Plaintiff's witness: Sylvino Cavestani, Asst. V.P., was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Hank Tai Bun aka Hank T. Bun aka Han P. Bun aka Hank Seng aka Tai Hen aka Hen Tai aka Hen T. Tai aka Hen tai Tai aka Hen Khow.
Principal of $49,778.68
Interest $8,319.18
Attorney's fees of $1,883.36
Costs of $274.50
For the total of $60,255.72.
Judgment signed in open court.
